entry.title: Re: purchase order report that includes custom fields and...
entry.content:
Hi Jagoda,

Thank you for your response.

I’ve tried using the Custom CDS Views, but unfortunately, I couldn’t find a field for the WBS element as needed.
The only related field I came across was WBSElementInternalID, but it doesn’t display the information I’m looking for.

Best regards,
Haily

entry.title: Re: Limitation on storage locations
entry.content: @jagdeepsingh83 That's right. There are 26 letters in the English alphabet - my bad. That number can go up if you count national characters like Polish Ą, Ę or German Ä, Ö, etc. Any way, the limit is way above 1M, which is more than enough.

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create/Post STO Purchase order Using BO/API

entry.title: Re: is Linked Analysis is possible for Time series chart ?
entry.content:
Hi ,

Please note timeseries chart, histogram, waterfall chart are not supported. please refer below

Ref. help doc from SAP help.com

Thanks with regards

G

entry.title: Re: How to add survey link to email template in SAP Sales...
entry.content:
Hello Ulla,

Thank you for sharing the SAP Note. Let me try to implement and let you know.

entry.title: Re: Error FAA_POST214 when reversing Asset Document of Le...
entry.content:
Hi Jeremy,

Thanks for your suggestion.

Following this note 2544536, I have created a new segment with transfer date as 01.01.2024 (I cannot change Transfer Date in original Legacy Transfer Segment because its status is already set as "Complete" and system does not allow to revert transfer status to previous stage). But even after creating new segment, system is still not allowing to reverse the Legacy Asset documents in 2024. Its merely because SAP only allows such posting as long as only fiscal year is open in Asset Accounting. So solution of note 2544536 totally depends on condition of maximum one year open.

At this point, i don't see any feasible solution allowing to reverse Legacy Asset documents in 2024 (when both 2024 and 2025 are open). I don't know if there is any possibility to make only 2024 open, do the required reversal and then close 2024 to re-open 2025. If you can still think of any other solution, then please do let me know. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Triggering side effect on press of Delete button
entry.content: Did you find the way to trigger the side effort for delete button?

entry.title: STO PO creation through BAPI
entry.content:
Hi All,

           I'm creating STO PO through BAPI_PO_CREATE1, while executing this I'm facing ME 083 Enter supplier error. I have maintained correct document type, suppling plant and other details whatever we maintain during manual creation of STO PO. Can you suggest any solution?

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK Title/Sections
entry.content:
I guess what I meant is what is the best way to group things together in sections, for instance have a section/Title 1 that might have 2 controls underneath and each control might have it's own subtitle. I have tried to use Object header as a title for each section( please advice if this is the best way to have title sections). Once I used Object header at the top the control underneath is nicely indented without grey space so the control looks part of the section/title however if I add another control after then there is always a grey area added even if I switch off all padding options. Then if I add an extra Object header to create a new section there is an extra grey area between this and the next control which was not there on the top Object header.

As a general idea it will be good if we can use CSS to remove padding/margin between components so for instance section components can stick together without gaps, for example header>next components or between 2 formcells( one with 3 divisions and another with 2) ... See my example below:

entry.title: Re: ECT-226339 - New Experience people profile rating num...
entry.content: Hi Tracy, The current design is intended to simplify the view in the summary card. We will display the rating value only if the rating value field is set as visible in the data model. If the rating value field is set as invisible, we will display the label instead. At the moment, we do not support configuration to toggle between displaying the value or label in the initial view. I’d recommend submitting an Influence Idea so we can evaluate the demand from customers. Thanks, Roan

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK Object table Single Select mode instead of mu...
entry.content: Thanks, I was thinking on an scenario where the user selects an item from the list and then can press 3 different action buttons.

entry.title: Re: Need help to convert the below code to SAP 7.4 syntax
entry.content:
Since the maximum number of segments is not specified, I am providing the snippet below based on my assumptions. Please modify it according to your requirements.

DATA: lt_edidd  TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF edidd,
      lt_edidd1 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF edidd.
CONSTANTS: BEGIN OF c_idoc,
             e1edp01 TYPE edidd-segnam VALUE 'E1EDP01',
             e1edp05 TYPE edidd-segnam VALUE 'E1EDP05',
             werks   TYPE werks_d VALUE 'GB55',
             pb00    TYPE kschl VALUE 'PB00',
             za01    TYPE kschl VALUE 'ZA01',
             zv00    TYPE kschl VALUE 'ZV00',
             za05    TYPE kschl VALUE 'ZA05',
           END OF c_idoc.

* If MAXIMUM number of same E1EDP05 segment is 1
lt_edidd = VALUE #( ( mandt = sy-mandt
docnum = '00000001'
segnum = '000001'
segnam = c_idoc-e1edp01
psgnum = space
hlevel = '01'
dtint2 = 1000
sdata = c_idoc-werks )
( mandt = sy-mandt
docnum = '00000001'
segnum = '000011'
segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05
psgnum = '000001'
hlevel = '02'
dtint2 = 1000
sdata = c_idoc-pb00 ) ).

SORT lt_edidd BY segnam psgnum.

IF line_exists( lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp01 ] ).
  IF lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp01 ]-sdata = c_idoc-werks. "sdata is structure with WERKS then use "-SDATA-WERKS"
    DATA(lv_segnum) = lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp01 ]-segnum.
    IF line_exists( lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05 psgnum = lv_segnum ] ).
      IF lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05 psgnum = lv_segnum ]-sdata = c_idoc-pb00.
        lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05 psgnum = lv_segnum ]-sdata = c_idoc-za01.
      ELSEIF lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05 psgnum = lv_segnum ]-sdata = c_idoc-zv00.
        lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05 psgnum = lv_segnum ]-sdata = c_idoc-za05.
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
    CLEAR lv_segnum.
  ENDIF.
ENDIF.

cl_demo_output=>display( lt_edidd ).

* If MAXIMUM number of same  E1EDP05 segment is more than 1
lt_edidd = VALUE #( ( mandt = sy-mandt
docnum = '00000001'
segnum = '000001'
segnam = c_idoc-e1edp01
psgnum = space
hlevel = '01'
dtint2 = 1000
sdata = c_idoc-werks )
( mandt = sy-mandt
docnum = '00000001'
segnum = '000011'
segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05
psgnum = '000001'
hlevel = '02'
dtint2 = 1000
sdata = c_idoc-pb00 )
( mandt = sy-mandt
docnum = '00000001'
segnum = '000012'
segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05
psgnum = '000001'
hlevel = '02'
dtint2 = 1000
sdata = c_idoc-zv00 ) ).

SORT lt_edidd BY segnam psgnum.

IF line_exists( lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp01 ] ).
  lv_segnum = lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp01 ]-segnum.
  lt_edidd1 = VALUE #( FOR wa IN lt_edidd
                      ( mandt = sy-mandt
                      docnum = wa-docnum
                      segnum = wa-segnum
                      segnam = wa-segnam
                      psgnum = wa-psgnum
                      hlevel = wa-hlevel
                      dtint2 = wa-dtint2
                      sdata = COND #( WHEN wa-segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05
                                       AND wa-psgnum = lv_segnum
                                       AND wa-sdata = c_idoc-pb00
                                       THEN c_idoc-za01
                                      WHEN wa-segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05
                                       AND wa-psgnum = lv_segnum
                                       AND wa-sdata = c_idoc-zv00 THEN c_idoc-za05
                                      ELSE wa-sdata )
                      ) ).
  CLEAR lv_segnum.
ENDIF.

cl_demo_output=>display( lt_edidd1 ).

entry.title: Re: How to add survey link to email template in SAP Sales...
entry.content:
Hi Ulla and all,

I have tried out the survey link via 'Feedback' feature in SAP C4C v2 and it worked as mentioned on the SAP note: https://me.sap.com/notes/3533836

As of now, it appears that V2 supports survey links exclusively through Qualtrics, unlike V1, where C4C out-of-the-box survey links could be directly embedded into survey emails.

entry.title: Help Needed:Function Module for Creating Work Center with Person/Position Assignment (IR01) W/o BDCs
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We are currently working on automating the creation of Work Centers using transaction IR01 in SAP. As part of this process, we also need to assign Persons or Positions (HR objects) to the Work Center.

Instead of using BDC (Batch Data Communication), we are looking for a function module or BAPI that can handle both the creation of the Work Center and the assignment of Persons/Positions to it in a clean and reliable way.

Has anyone implemented this kind of functionality before? If so, could you please share:

  • The function module(s) or BAPI(s) used

  • Any prerequisites or tips to be aware of

  • How the assignment to HR objects (Persons/Positions) was handled

Your input would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - Unable to parse hcicertificate using KeystoreService
entry.content: Hi Ricardo, Thanks for your reply. My requirement is to connect CPI with SharePoint via Microsoft Entra Login using client certificate authentication type. Since there is no OAuth Client Certificate Type in Security material, I am trying to use Microsoft provided java classes in groovy script to get AccessToken. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/java/api/com.azure.identity.clientcertificatecredentialbuilder?view=azure-java-stable As per this document page, pfxCertificate() method accepts certificate in InputStream format. First, I used .pfx file which works for non-SAP systems to connect SharePoint. Next, tried hcicertificate provided by SAP in CPI keystore (exported its .cer certificate and shared it with EUC team to upload them for the same Login ID in ENtra). But both options gave same error "Failed to parse the certificate for the credential: DER input, Integer tag error". Please let me know if you need any additional detail, thank you.

entry.title: Re: Duplicate run of integration flow consuming event from event mesh
entry.content: @Ryan-Crosby Thanks for the response. I am using Event Mesh of Integration Suite. Can you please clarify where the queue setting is 'set to require acknowledgement' ?

entry.title: NOT ABLE TO POST PO FOR NLAG MATERIALS
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

 

kindly suggest me on this not able to post a po for NLAG material now, but usually able to post previously ..

this is the error which showed .

 

Regards,

zareena

entry.title: Re: "Talent Card Like" report created in Story Report?
entry.content:
Hi Drose,

You can create Talent Card like reports. However, Story Reports isn't the intended tool for it. But I have seen some nice examples created by customers. When you have the employee ID as a Story filter then you can use the File > Export function and enable batch processing. You can then select your story filter and select the x-number of employees. It will then generate the report for each employee on a separate page.

Kind regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: Re: Monitor Supplier Confirmations - Date Variance
entry.content:
Hello SF

The date variance field shows you a date variance. 

Positive ( + ) delivery arrives later than planned

Negative ( - ) delivery arrives earlier than planned

0 - No deviation, delivery as planned

However, there are Alterations in Supplier Confirmations. SAP automatically recognizes the deviation if the confirmed date is later than the planned date.

Best regards

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation - changes?!
entry.content:
Hi Sanne,

Adding to Jeremy's information, you can check this KBA and it has recent blog, which answers your query.

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003526213

Best Regards,

Annapurna

entry.title: Duplicate run of integration flow consuming event from event mesh of SAP Cloud Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a doubt related to event message consumption in SAP Cloud Integration. I am consuming an event topic configured in Event Mesh capability within SAP Integration Suite.

 

And created a topic subscription in the above queue. This event is sent from S/4HANA Cloud system when a sales order item is changed.

 

 

I am consuming the event in Cloud Integration process using AMQP sender adapter

 

 

 

 

Now when a sales order item is changed in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, I see the iFlow is triggered successfully but there always are two runs in the log:

 

Also the queue in event mesh is not cleared even after successful completion of the message in cloud integration process consuming the event.

 

1. Why is it triggering two runs of the same consumer integration process?

2. Why is the queue not getting cleared after integration flow completes.

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud, embedded edition – the Way Ahead
entry.content:
Hello @monicasfarcioc1 

I'm sorry have not seen any written statement, either.

But what I can tell you is that Joule in the current version of my S4HC public Test tenant is not able to provide any simple answer about available key figures in eSAC stories, even if this seems easy from an enduser perspective.

I guess this is one more reason to retire it, to avoid efforts of Joule/Just ask integration in the eSAC.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Manage Purchase Contracts does not shown any PC
entry.content:
Hello Sridhar,

it could possibly be due to the authorizations, so check whether the user roles have the appropriate display authorization and check whether there is a separate Fiori app authorization for displaying.

Once you have checked this, you can check whether all filters have really been removed. It may be that no filter is visible, but a filter could be set unconsciously, e.g. a field is filled with an empty line.

Check whether there is a problem with the synchronization or the data.

Make sure that no setting in the customizing or backend is blocking the display.

Also test the problem in a test environment to see if it is specific to the production environment.

 

Best regards

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Cost allocation on basis of production quantity in SA...
entry.content:
Hi Achintya,

It is not clear from question on which cost allocation. If you are looking for cost allocation using Universal Allocation based on produced quantity, please use SKF (stat key figure)  function in Universal Allocation. Create SKF for production quantity with proper UoM. Then maintain rule in Universal Allocation cycle - segment that allocation is based on SKF and give the SKF you created for the Production Quantity.

If you are looking for allocation in different area not Universal Allocation, please let me know.

entry.title: Re: Delivery Split Based on Item Quantity in Sales order
entry.content:
Hi Chaiphon, I know, this thread is 10 years old, but some requirements never die 🙂
the link you posted seems not to exist anymore and searching the hub with 'BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_SPLIT_DEC' didn't bring it up either. If this message gets to you, do you still happen to have the snippet... I'm facing exactly that challenge
Thanks;
Regards
Lars

entry.title: Re: GTS Hard Block, follow-up documents created
entry.content:
Hi Annika,

the block of follow up documents is controlled under "Subsequent Functions" in this customizing step. The 3 checkboxes for preventing delivery creation, purchase requisition creation and output should be activated, if those preventions should be active. I am sure that you already tried to activate them.

Additionally, it is possible to control the prevention on two levels: 1. Document Type and 2. Document Type + Company Code.
Please try to change setting "Activation Level" to "Document Type" or check if there are any other settings for the combination of Document Type and Company Code (navigation via folder at the left side bar).

Furthermore, there are BAdis that can control the transfer of documents as well, e.g. "BAdi: Control Interface Calls from Sales Documents (SD0A)". The BAdis are overwriting the control settings in customizing.

Hope this helps.

Best regards
Fabian

entry.title: Re: Story reporting - Last Trans Seq
entry.content:
Hi Mirjam,

In Stories the filed is called different. It's called "Effective Latest Change" which will show a "Y" for the latest transaction in case there are multiple transactions on one day.

Kind regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: Re: Reporting on all Indirect Reports with Story Reporting
entry.content:
Hi mgheorghiuaur,

Have you already tried importing the Standard Template: Employee Hierarchy Report. This report goes up to 5 levels but you can extend it to include more levels.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PEOPLE_ANALYTICS/1a17ad0982664c629f8af7d47a631672/9206f3e31f954d97a97ae056983789b8.html?locale=en-US

Kind regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: Re: How to automate clearing status of Bank Items when po...
entry.content:
Hi Meri, 
@Melle1028 

I'm afraid I can't answer your question about the "clearing status" of bank statement items...

However, as to your question about an autoamted process, have you ahd a look at the following Help Portal content? 

- Overview on Automatic Bank Statement Processing
- How to Automate Processing Rules

I also recommend you to have a look at the in-app help - the help content that is available within the apps. You can access it via the question mark button at the top right corner.

Automated processing rules can post bank statement items and clear open items in the system automatically. 

Best regards,

Anita

entry.title: Re: Stock Availability Access
entry.content: No, there is no standard app that shows ATP quantities for multiple materials.

entry.title: Re: Dear experts, In SAC, I have a distinct Cost center a...
entry.content: One member cannot has two different parent in one hierarchy.

entry.title: Re: COGS split into fixed and variable in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Achintya,

To get the product cost split by fixed and variable cost:

1. Need to define in cost component structure - whether a cost component is variable only of fixed and variable nature.

2. If the cost component is of fixed and variable nature, for example like labor cost - please maintain the fixed and variable cost in activity price maintenance.

3. All costs that are relevant for material inputs like - raw materials, packaging costs should be set as variable in the cost components.

4. Any overhead calculation cost components will be designed as fixed costs in cost components.

With you can see the product cost break down by fixed and variable in standard cost reports.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Create Sales Orders - Automatic Extraction (I): Introduction

entry.title: Re: Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition 2023 FPS2
entry.content:
Dear @PiyushaBuldeo 

Thanks for the reply.

We have tried everything but not successful to do custom enhancement in Change request, hence we went with Claim Management from ERP side.

Unfortunately CPM does not have many standard enhancement spot hence it is difficult to map business requirements especially in On-prem or Private Cloud version. 

Hope SAP will add more enhancements spots including screen extension BAdi in the future to make CPM more business friendly.

Thanks

Abdul

entry.title: Re: Error running step by step to generate ABAP Flight Reference Scenario tables
entry.content: You can't create a new entry in abapGit if one entry already exists for the same URL. Click Show all to display all entries, find the one corresonding to the URL, then pull the code again.

entry.title: Re: Sub-Phases for PPM Project
entry.content: SAP has confirmed that it is not possible to add Sub-Phase even with enhancement

entry.title: Re: SAP BUILD importing .mtar file error
entry.content:
Can you check if you see the projects that fail to import in web preview dashboard?

To me this sounds like that there might have been some issue during the initial import, but from build apps side the import had been successful.

entry.title: Get Hands-On Workshops with SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content:
We’ve designed the SAP Data & Analytics Discovery Days Program—a set of complimentary, hands-on virtual workshops built for IT leaders and Line-of-Business (LOB) users. Delivered in partnership with our trusted SAP partner ecosystem, these workshops focus on turning your data into real, immediate outcomes with SAP Business Data Cloud. 

What You’ll Learn 
Join SAP experts and partners to explore how to: 

  • Connect data and AI tools across your existing systems 
  • Unite planning and analytics to speed up decision-making 
  • Embed reliable, scalable AI into business processes 
  • Standardize data models for consistent reporting and access 

Why It’s Worth Your Time 
Whether you’re leading transformation from IT or executing strategy in a business unit, these workshops will help you close the gap between insight and action. You’ll leave with practical tools, real-world examples, and a clearer path to using SAP Business Data Cloud to drive smarter, faster decisions. 

Register now to select the sessions, topics, and times that work best for your team. 
Register for Workshops in North America  
Register for Workshops in Europe  
Register for Workshops in Latin America

entry.title: Re: New 2H 2023 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features
entry.content:
Hi @Volker_Ruof 

Thank you for the valuable contributions you’re making to the Time Management solution.

And you need a reference date. This is necessary to define from which date the base unit shall start. Currently it is allowed to choose only the first of a month. So, you can´t create valulations that run from 15th january till 27th of September (and I never heard of such a requirement, drop me a note if you have got one).


The reference date and the base units might be enhanced in the future to enable different valuations, like for example "rolling 10 days", but for the beginning we start with the above mentioned options. But you see already that with this fields there is the theoretical possibility to become quite flexible !

We’ve received specific requests from customers about payroll processing scenarios where time valuation results need to span from the previous month's second half through the current month's first half. This requires greater flexibility in defining the reference date—ideally supporting mid-month or rolling valuation periods.

Given this requirement, we’d appreciate your insights on the tentative roadmap for enhancements to the reference date and base unit functionality. Is there a planned timeline or consideration for supporting more dynamic valuation periods in the near future?

Looking forward to your feedback.

Thanks,

Venugopal Chowdhary

entry.title: Re: Access https://sapes5.sapdevcenter.com/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/GWSAMPLE_BASIC/ doesn't work
entry.content: It has been retired: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/getting-server-reached-when-going-to-login-in-es5-trial-system/qaq-p/12808178

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
I fixed the issue by applying license after the installation. Below are the steps

  1. Install and run the docker image. Cannot login in GUI as default license is expired.
  2. Get the Hardware key from the terminal.
  3. Get the license from minisap using hardware key.
  4. Copy the license into the running container by command 
docker cp <local path the key file> a4h:/opt/sap/ASABAP_license
  •  Trigger license update. 
docker exec -it a4h /usr/local/bin/asabap_license_update​
  • Now login into GUI and check in SLICENSE t-code.
  • Now on every restart whenever the Hardware key changes. License should be valid.

entry.title: Re: Story Report Enablement
entry.content:
Hi Arren_C,

 

You can find all details in this IDP document:  https://d.dam.sap.com/a/JPG32pq/SAP%20SuccessFactors%20Stories%20in%20People%20Analytics-Enablement%20Configuraiton-V1.3.pdf?rc=10&inline=true

Kind regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields CPM
entry.content:
Hi

Unfortunately there is no standard enhancement available for CPM to add custom fields. Only option is to make changes to standard webdynpro app and store the details in a custom table. Enhancing the standard table will be a nightmare.

@Rahul_Jalan

entry.title: Re: 2023 Release Highlights in Seconds: SAP S/4HANA & SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition
entry.content: Great blog Nobby, we still miss you down under!

entry.title: Re: Posting rejected (UPDATE_REJECT).Order 104XXXX could...
entry.content:
Hello Jeremy_Deo,
Above mentioned points are possible cause for the Posting rejected  error.                                                                                                                                         
Thank You for reply

entry.title: Re: SAC ODE Story error
entry.content: I got this problem when entering 2025. It was connected to a table in the story. In the table, I had a filter on a certain time period passed time. When entering the new year of 2025, we did not longer load data for that period which I had filter on. Updated the time filter and it solved the problem. For the record, I'm still in "Enable Reporting Layout" which was suggested here earlier, but that still works to me. // Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Can we link in Reporting if the candidate is the same...
entry.content:
Hi Wanda3,

This is not standard. You would require to have the candidate ID or Application ID in the. Job Information table. I have seen this with some customers. The application ID or Candidate ID gets written from RCM to EC / Job Information when the person is hired. With reporting you can then always link it back to the Job Requisition, Application and Candidate.

Kind regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: Re: Credit Limit based on sales area or credit segment in...
entry.content:
Dear @hasan_ahmed1,

We need to assign the credit control Area to the different company in the below path, 

Goto SPRO --> Enterprise structure --> Assignment --> Financial accounting --> Assigning Company code to credit control area.
The sales area configuration is not required for this as we are having different company codes in this case.

We need to have different credit control area and Credit segment for each company codes.
Hope this helps!!!

Best Regards,
Surya.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Aggregate Values o...
entry.content:
Hi @guenay

I am not clear about the "dynamic date" you mentioned. How can we know the dates "202501" to "202503"? Is it a fixed date or the previous 3 months from the current month(today: 16-Apr)? 

One more case is below,

202501–202503 → 202604

202502–202504 → 202605

...

202511–202601 → 202702

202512–202602 → 202703

 

Regards,

Moonjun

entry.title: Re: Firebase Authentication Error in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: @timokapanen , we have some news? thanks.

entry.title: Re: COGS split into fixed and variable in Public Cloud
entry.content: Hi, We have a Labour activity and in cost component structure it is defined as fixed and variable. In product costing reports we are able to see fixed and variable cost separately but the issue is when we sell the material to customer we want to see the fixed and variable breakup in Market segment report (cost of goods sold split) . When we configure cost of goods sold split, is there an option to post fixed value and variable value to different GL accounts?

entry.title: Re: Additional report templates for Status and Trends Review reports
entry.content:
Dear @Rahul_Jalan 

Thank you for the detailed post.

Request you to kindly create a blog on adding custom fields to Master Project, Risk Register, Issue Register, Change Request etc.

Thanks

Abdul
SAP Commercial Project Management

entry.title: Re: MDK - Obtain section name from context in QueryOption...
entry.content: Thanks for your reaction Bill. If opening a feature request is the way to go, then it appears that is what we should do. I do hope these proxy classes will be added in the future, this would facilitate certain developments to an immense extent.

entry.title: How to attach file to Q&A and Blog Posts in Community 2024 ?
entry.content:
Is it planned to allow attaching a file to questions, answers, blog posts and comments? Currently, only links are allowed (i.e. publish the file in an external Web site and insert its link).

For instance, let's say I want to attach some source code with 100 or more lines, it's not really relevant to include it right into the question, but to attach it as a text file.

Also, if I want to add 2 or more text files (e.g. code as Git), that would be nice to accept ZIP files too.

If the policy is to not allow attaching files, do SAP Community recommend one external Web site to store and persist them?

Thank you.

Sandra

PS: apologies if the question was already asked but I couldn't find it.

entry.title: Re: Changing my universal ID from S USER to P USER
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

Good day! 

Any recommendation that you can provide?

The email was change to my personal email but the universal is still the S User. 

I wanted to change the UID from my S User to my P User. 

Thanks,

 Joerom Ramos

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam Request for Hamburg - ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

Best regards,

Eberechukwu Nwaobiora

entry.title: Re: Transport Model from Dev to Prod
entry.content:
Hi Jain,

Best practice here is to create a connection in Dev and then transport the connection to Prod. In Prod you adjust the credentials, environment, etc. to match you Prod data source. When you build a model based on the connection in Dev and transport the model to Prod it will use this connection because it has the same ID as an object in your tenants. You don't transport the connection.

Kind regards,
Martijn van Foeken | Interdobs

entry.title: Changing my UID
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

Good day! 

I wanted to change my UID from S User to my P User. 

Any steps how to do that?

Currently I was able to change universal email to my personal account but my UID is still my S User. 

Thanks,

 Joerom Ramos

entry.title: Re: Identity Directory API specification is broken
entry.content: Hi, I've had the same issue. After opening a ticket with SAP they comfirmed the open API spec file is getting evaluated as an invalid file due to the presence of references to external third party sites in it. They sent me a new file that is working for me now. Hopefully they will update the Business Accelerator Hub file soon. I am not able to upload the API spec file in this forum.

entry.title: Re: Email Notification for Completed Supplier Invoice App...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

Yes, MRM_COIV_WF_APPROVE is applicable when using the “Create Supplier Invoice” app and clicking “Save as Completed”

When you use the Create Supplier Invoice – Advanced app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and:

  • You click the Save as Completed button,
  • AND you have a workflow active for "Parked as Complete" invoices (scenario WS00800303),

Then the invoice is considered complete and submitted for approval via the workflow.

Once the invoice is approved in that workflow, the MRM_COIV_WF_APPROVE email template is triggered.

 

I hope this will help answer your last question 😊.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Error FAA_POST214 when reversing Asset Document of Le...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

I haven't even paid attention to the fact that you already talked about the mentioned note. My mistake sorry.

I also find another topic about the last error message you get following the instruction of the note 2544536.

Can you check this link and see if it can help you out ?

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/closed-fiscal-year-does-not-agree-with-legacy-data-transfer-date/qaq-p/6528262

If it doesn't solve your issue, hopefully a colleague of mine will take the lead on this topic.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: System Shows Message "one or more down payment requests exist and can be assigned"
entry.content:
You are about to invoice an outbound delivery invoice request. After click the invoice button, system shows the new invoice and you observe the message at the bottom: For Outbound Delivery Invoice Request ** one or more down payment requests exist and can be assigned.

You want to know why system shows this message.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: System Shows Message "one or more down payment reques...
entry.content:
Dear requester,

In your system, there are one or some down payment requests open and could be applied into the invoice request, so system shows the alert. You can choose to add the down payment manually.

To verify, you can edit the outbound delivery invoice request , In the Assigned down payments, click Add Row, from the value help list, there are some down payment requests available.

Also, you can see the available down payment for the account by following steps:

Go to Customer Invoicing - Invoice Documents view, show 'Open Down Payment Requests', filter account=ABC, we can find the available down payment requests that available for this account.

 

Thanks,

Adie

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Changing my UID
entry.content:
Based on the information provided, it appears that you would like to update the email associated with your SAP universal ID. If this is correct, you can follow the steps outlined below to make the change: 2962360 - How to change the primary e-mail address - SAP Universal ID (UID)

If you have any questions or further assistance, please feel free to contact us.

Best regards,
Judy

entry.title: Re: SAP Sales Cloud and SAP Service Cloud version 2 - Client Certificate authentication (Outbound)
entry.content:
Hi @AbinashNanda @AnkitaDua @Saurabh_Kabra ,

 

Please let me know how we will get the certificate signed. Have raised an incident to SAP , however no response. 

We have done following to generate certificate:

  1. create a keypair in keystore
  2. Download the signing request

     

How do we do the 3rd step , get signed certificate from CA ?

Any input on this will be helpful.

 

Regards,

Raj Priya

entry.title: Re: Story reporting - Last Trans Seq
entry.content: Hi, Jeroen. Unfortunately, this option won’t work because the purpose of the graph is to display only promotions. If I enable the option Y in the Graph, it will look all events reasons from the job information, which would exclude relevant data. The Promotion event is not always the last event.

entry.title: Custom Accrual condition not being reversed
entry.content:
We are using standard sale rebate contract (0S01) and pricing procedure A10005. We added one custom condition as Accruals (because we did not want to settle this directly with customer) as ZREP which will be a percentage based condition of the business volume. During the partial settlement rebate condition RES1 is being corrected by RES2 which holds the previous settlement value but the custom accrual condition is not being corrected. It calculates the value based on complete business volume without reversing it. Below are few screenshots of config already done:

Any help will be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: is there is any table which provide Posting date of budget supplement document number.
entry.content: i have requirement of change in supplement or return in wbs element budget. i got the document number, but unable to find out the document posting date.

entry.title: Re: Story reporting - Last Trans Seq
entry.content:
Hi Mirjam,

Your question was about the Last Transaction Seq. In Story Reports this field is called Effective Latest Change and has exactly the same function as Last Transaction Seq in canvas Reporting.

In case you only want to capture Promotion Events then I suggest working with a Data Range filter and apply a filter on the Event = "Promotion". As an alternative you can create a change report where you focus for example on Pay Grade Change or an other field change that indicates that someone has been promoted. 

Kind regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: Re: Question: Difference between Learning Proxy page vs L...
entry.content:
Hi,

The "official" info says that you can not proxy from BizX onto LMS. The My Learning tile is actually hidden when you are in proxy (even if you check "Learning" in the Proxy Management page. You should proxy from within the LMS admin to access the My Learning sections. 

The LMS proxy prevents from launching courses or exams in place of the learner. You can navigate and register, that's pretty much it.

You can however trick the BizX proxy, by creating a direct link in the LMS, add as BizX short cuts, and launch that shortcut while proxying. With this approach, you can do anything on behalf of the account holder. Note that the audit trails will not spot you are proxying, so just keep that in mind.

Hope this clarifies the magical mysteries of proxy.

Cheers,

 

Kris.

entry.title: Re: Support CrystalReportViewer.DoubleClickPage in ASP.NE...
entry.content: Hello ido!, your solution is very perfect!, Now I don't need to create custom javascript. I can now just use hyperlink to open new report based on current row data. this is amazing. I try to set HyperlinkTarget="_blank" to make hyperlink open a report in new tab. I wish I can open it in new window but didn't find a way to do that. such as window.open javascript. see my video please https://youtu.be/pdZRMit7ebQ I also have shared reports between windows and ASP.NET how to turn off hyperlink in WinForms (Windows) and allow it in ASP.NET Web?

entry.title: Re: Support CrystalReportViewer.DoubleClickPage in ASP.NE...
entry.content: This is my complete hyperlink formula it work perfect. "/Report.aspx?reportPath=D:\Business\Exa Cloud\Exa Cloud Source\ExaCloud\Reps\02\AccJV.rpt&reportSelection=" + URLEncode( "{AccTransHed.thd_brn} = " + ToText({VwAccTrans.tdt_brn}, 0, "") + " and {AccTransHed.thd_typ} = " + ToText({VwAccTrans.tdt_typ}, 0, "") + " and {AccTransHed.thd_num} = " + ToText({VwAccTrans.tdt_num}, 0, "") )

entry.title: Re: Problems with CAP App cds.persistence.skip
entry.content: Hi

entry.title: Re: Sequential Multicast suppressing error details
entry.content:
Hi Ricardo,

Neither of these are possible, because OData is failing with a 400 error, so iFlow processing ceases at that point. Exception handling is invoked and within exception handling, we have the camel error available, not the OData error.

We dont have the option to interrogate the OData response via Groovy, before it enters Exception Handling. If we had that option, your suggestion would work perfectly.

Thank you,

Eoin

Melle

entry.title: Re: Exploring New SQL on Files Use Cases with SAP HANA Cloud QRC 04/2024 and QRC 01/2025
entry.content: @SeungjoonLee Is it also possible (or will it be possible) to share delta tables from the HANA data lake as a provider for other delta lakes recipients?

entry.title: Re: is there is any table which provide Posting date of b...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

In SAP S/4HANA (including Public Cloud), for WBS element budget supplements or returns, you can track posting dates of budget documents using the following tables and approaches:

Primary Table: BPGE – Budget Line Items (CO)

  • Table Name: BPGE
  • Purpose: Stores budget line items including original budget, supplements, returns, transfers, etc.
  • Key Fields:
    • BELNR: Budget document number
    • OBJNR: Object number (related to WBS element)
    • GJAHR: Fiscal year
    • BDGT_TYPE: Budget type (e.g., supplement, return)
    • BUDAT: Posting date of the budget document

Use this table to retrieve the posting date (BUDAT) for your budget supplement document number

 

I hope this will help answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Enforce a secure re-authentication for each new SAP GUI connection, with SAP Secure Login Servic
entry.content:
Hi @Christian_Cohrs 

We have a need to use the option to force people to authenticate without SSO using Azure MFA.

What I've noticed is that even with sncForceLogin set to '3' and ServerSessionKeyMode to '1' you are not asked for Azure MFA per SNC connection if your Windows PC already has an organisation login with the same user elsewhere e.g. OneDrive. The connection does authenticate to Azure AD for each SNC connection but there is no prompt for MFA.

Is there some way to not only disable SSO but to also force MFA (with re-authentication) for each new SNC connection made to a SAP system?

Thanks & Regards, Nelis

entry.title: Re: The SAP BW Data Product Generator for SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content: Hi Christof! Thanks for your blog. I guess this applies for SAP Databricks. On the presentation deck it is written down that there is a partner connect to an enterprise Databricks. Could you please explain if the partner connect will provide the same Delta Share from the Object Store?

entry.title: Re: Catalogue activation pre requisits and ANID
entry.content:
Hi @Arvand  since you are asking about external catalogs, yes the trading relationship between the buyer and the supplier on SAP Business Network is a prerequisite. Without it, the supplier will not be able to upload the catalog for the buyer and therefore the buyer will not receive the catalog.

Also, the supplier record must be maintained in the core administration of the procurement application. It can be done in different ways, but it is recommended that you always use the same method of
adding suppliers to ensure that supplier data is properly synchronized. You can maintain the supplier records:

1. By pulling the supplier data from an ERP

2. or from the supplier’s profile on SAP Business

3. or you can add the supplier manually using the Supplier Manager workspace. If you choose this method,
you create the common supplier first and then add the ANID to it.

Best regards

Marco

entry.title: Re: Anyone taken the sap C_S4CFI_2504 exam recently? Need...
entry.content:
Hi john, I did the C_S4CFI_2504 last week. Yes, the Learning Journey helps, but I felt the same, the org structure stuff in cloud can be weird at first. Took me a bit to really get how company code, chart of accounts, and business partner roles connect, especially with CBC in the mix.

A few areas I’d say are worth extra time:

  • Fiori apps — not just what they’re called, but what they actually do
  • Scope items + fit-to-standard process
  • Finance flows like AP/AR, asset accounting, and period-end
  • Basic integration concepts (APIs, comm arrangements, etc.)

Some of the trickier stuff was around extensibility (what’s in-app vs side-by-side) and also some questions on test automation and release cycles that felt a little out of left field.

As for practice, I used CertBoosters, not perfect, but honestly way better than the tiny set of sample questions SAP gives you and most of the random stuff out there. The practice test questions felt similar in style to the real thing and helped me figure out what I didn’t fully understand yet.

Hope that helps.

entry.title: Re: is there is any table which provide Posting date of b...
entry.content: Hi, BUDAT Is not exist in table

entry.title: Outgoing Payment Print Layout Design has limitation on its Repetitive row details
entry.content:
Hi All

Please help confirm SAP Business One Outgoing Payment Print Layout Design has limitation on its Repetitive row details?  It does not print anything no matter what Field is placed on its Repetitive row details?

We managed to place Account Type Outgoing Payment GL Account Code on the Start of Report Header level but it will only show the first GL Account if there are multiple GL Accounts in Account Type Outgoing Payment.

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: How to update the 3E Regulation Content in EHS？
entry.content:
I have two questions to ask about the 3E regulatory content, could you help to answer these questions？

  1. How to update the 3E Regulation Content？
  2. If the company has not been updated for several years, Would I only update the latest version of the regulatory content, or do I need to update the process version step by step?
